Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Protective Order For Discovery Of Confidential Information
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Daniel Kasabian, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Canter & Associates
Gayle Ml Athanacio, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: Teachscape, Inc.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted and modified: Plaintiff Canter & Associates, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Protective Order For Discovery Of Confidential Information is granted in part and denied in part. The court approves the entry of the proposed Protective Order with the exception of the provisions of Paragraph 12. The court would approve a provision similar to the provision discussed in Brown Bag Software v Symantec Corp. which required a party to seek court approval to show specific items to in-house counsel upon a showing of good cause.
MODIFICATIONS;
-to eliminate Laureate Education, Inc. in the definition as a party to this action and includes Laureate in the procedure to seek court permission for access to specific items. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
